    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    EfsEventBus.Advertisement<E extends IEfsEvent>
    An advertisement is an publishing agent's access point to a event class+topic feed.
    static class 
    EfsEventBus.Subscription<E extends IEfsEvent>
    Abstract base class for concrete, inbox, and router subscriptions.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    ADVERTISEMENT_CLOSED
    Attempting to interact with a closed advertisement results in an IllegalStateException with the message "advertisement is closed".
    static final String
    INVALID_BUS_NAME
    An invalid bus name results in an IllegalArgumentException with message "busName is either null, an empty string, or blank".
    static final String
    INVALID_TOPIC
    An invalid topic results in an IllegalArgumentException with message "topic is either null, an empty string, or blank".
    static final String
    NO_SUBSCRIBERS
    Attempting to fowardEvent an event while there are no subscribers to the topic results in an IllegalStateException with the message "no subscribers".
    static final String
    NULL_AGENT
    A null agent argument results in a NullPointerException with message "agent is null".
    static final String
    NULL_CALLBACK
    A null callback results in a NullPointerException with message "callback is null".
    static final String
    NULL_EVENT
    A null event argument results in a NullPointerException with message "event is null".
    static final String
    NULL_EVENT_CLASS
    A null event class results in a NullPointerException with message "eventClass is null".
    static final String
    NULL_ROUTER
    A null event router argument results in a NullPointerException with message "event router is null".
    static final String
    NULL_TOPIC_KEY
    A null topic key results in a NullPointerException with message "topicKey is null".
    static final String
    NULL_TOPICS
    A null topics list argument results in a NullPointerException with message "topics is null".
    static final String
    PUBLISH_STATUS_DOWN
    Attempting to fowardEvent an event while fowardEvent status is set to false results in an IllegalStateException with the message "publish status is down".

  • Method Details

    • busName

      public String busName()
      Returns efs event bus name which is unique within JVM.
      Returns:
      unique event bus name.

    • addTopic

      public <E extends IEfsEvent> void addTopic(EfsTopicKey<E> topicKey)
      Reports a event topic key to bus independent of an advertisement or subscription. This method is used when advertiseAll(Class, String, Consumer, Consumer, IEfsAgent) and subscribeAll(Class, String, boolean, Consumer, Consumer, Consumer, IEfsAgent) reference the same topic keys. Since it is not possible to match advertised and subscribed wildcard topics, it is necessary to report concrete topics separately.
      Type Parameters:
      E - event type.
      Parameters:
      topicKey - event topic key to be added.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if topicKey is null.

    • addTopics

      public <E extends IEfsEvent> void addTopics(Class<E> eventClass, List<String> topics)
      Reports multiple topics for a given event class independent of an advertisement or subscription. This method is used when advertiseAll(Class, String, Consumer, Consumer, IEfsAgent) and subscribeAll(Class, String, boolean, Consumer, Consumer, Consumer, IEfsAgent) reference the same topic keys. Since it is not possible to match advertised and subscribed wildcard topics, it is necessary to report concrete topics separately.

      Exceptions are thrown before any topic key processing happens, meaning that no topic keys are added to topic key map when an exception is thrown.

      Type Parameters:
      E - event type.
      Parameters:
      eventClass - topic key class.
      topics - topic key topics.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if either eventClass or topics is null.
      IllegalArgumentException - if topics contains a null, empty, or blank topic. If thrown, then no topics were processed.

    • advertise

      public <E extends IEfsEvent> EfsEventBus.Advertisement<E> advertise(EfsTopicKey<E> topicKey, Consumer<EfsSubscribeStatus<E>> sscb, IEfsAgent publisher)
      Advertises an event class, topic published by an agent, returning a closeable instance used to retract this advertisement when closed. If this is a new topic key, then finds all extant wildcard subscriptions which match this topic key and has them subscribe.

      Returned Advertisement is then used to set the publish status and publish events.

      Type Parameters:
      E - event class.
      Parameters:
      topicKey - advertise event class and topic.
      sscb - EfsSubscribeStatus event callback.
      publisher - agent advertising ability to publish to given topic key.
      Returns:
      closeable instance used to retract advertisement.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if either topicKey, sscb, or publisher is null.
      IllegalStateException - publisher is not registered with EfsDispatcher.

    • advertiseAll

      public <E extends IEfsEvent> org.efs.bus.EfsEventBus.WildcardAdvertisement<E> advertiseAll(Class<E> eventClass, String regexTopic, Consumer<EfsSubscribeStatus<E>> sscb, Consumer<EfsTopicKey<E>> topicUpdate, IEfsAgent publisher)
      TODO
      Type Parameters:
      E - efs event class.
      Parameters:
      eventClass - target efs event class.
      regexTopic - regular expression matched against existing concrete topics.
      sscb - EfsSubscribeStatus event callback.
      topicUpdate - newly discovered topic keys matching wildcard reported via this callback.
      publisher - agent advertising ability to publish to given topic key.
      Returns:
      wildcard advertisement.

    • subscribe

      public <E extends IEfsEvent> EfsEventBus.Subscription<E> subscribe(EfsTopicKey<E> topicKey, Consumer<EfsPublishStatus<E>> pscb, Consumer<E> ecb, IEfsAgent subscriber)
      TODO
      Type Parameters:
      E - efs event class
      Parameters:
      topicKey - subscribe to this event class and topic.
      pscb - forward publisher status events to this callback.
      ecb - forward events to this callback.
      subscriber - agent subscriber.
      Returns:
      closeable subscription.

    • subscribeInbox

      public <E extends IEfsEvent> EfsEventBus.Subscription<E> subscribeInbox(EfsTopicKey<E> topicKey, Consumer<EfsPublishStatus<E>> pscb, Consumer<E> ecb, IEfsAgent subscriber)
      TODO
      Type Parameters:
      E - efs event class.
      Parameters:
      topicKey - subscribe to this event class and topic.
      pscb - forward publisher status events to this callback.
      ecb - forward events to this callback.
      subscriber - agent subscriber.
      Returns:
      closeable subscription.

    • subscribeAll

      public <E extends IEfsEvent> org.efs.bus.EfsEventBus.WildcardSubscription<E> subscribeAll(Class<E> eventClass, String regexTopic, boolean isInBox, Consumer<EfsPublishStatus<E>> pscb, Consumer<E> ecb, Consumer<EfsTopicKey<E>> topicUpdate, IEfsAgent subscriber)
      TODO
      Type Parameters:
      E - event type
      Parameters:
      eventClass - subscribing to this event class.
      regexTopic - regular expression matched against event topics within event class.
      isInBox - true if this is an inbox subscription.
      pscb - forward publisher status events to this callback.
      ecb - forward events to this callback.
      topicUpdate - inform agent of newly discovered topic keys via this callback.
      subscriber - agent subscriber.
      Returns:
      closeable subscription.

    • subscribeRouter

      public <E extends IEfsEvent> EfsEventBus.Subscription<E> subscribeRouter(EfsTopicKey<E> topicKey, Consumer<EfsPublishStatus<E>> pscb, IEventRouter<E> router, IEfsAgent subscriber)
      TODO
      Type Parameters:
      E - event class
      Parameters:
      topicKey - subscribe to this topic key.
      pscb - publish status event callback.
      router - routes events to agents.
      subscriber - agent placing this subscription.
      Returns:
      subscription used to track topic key publish status.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if either topicKey or router is null.

    • findOrCreateBus

      public static EfsEventBus findOrCreateBus(String busName)
      Returns efs event bus associated with the given name. If there is no such event bus for given name, then a new event bus is constructed for that name.
      Parameters:
      busName - bus name. Must be unique within JVM.
      Returns:
      event bus for given name.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if busName is either null, an empty string, or blank.
